title: 大阪杯の後に・目指すは1着のみ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon dominates at the Osaka Hai! The
Queen of the Amazons is better than ever, and
her incredible running reflects that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She responds to the cheering audience with pride.
Next on her list is winning first place at the
Yasuda Kinen!
